overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a vehicle driving along a foggy elevated highway at night. Orange sodium vapor street lights pierce through heavy mist, illuminating wet asphalt and modern glass skyscrapers while the camera passes under overhead highway gantries.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway approach with overhead gantry

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along the foggy elevated highway toward an overhead sign gantry

entered.detail: tall dual-lamp posts emitting warm orange sodium vapor light through the fog
tall modern glass skyscraper with illuminated windows looming in the fog
illuminated commercial billboards visible through the mist on the left side
large overhead highway sign structure spanning across the road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy night highway illuminated by orange street lamps. The camera moves forward along wet asphalt toward an overhead gantry, with a massive glass skyscraper visible through the mist on the right and illuminated billboards on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with overhead power lines

events.description: passing under the first overhead highway gantry
black SUV overtakes on the left and drives ahead into the fog

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway after passing under the gantry, maintaining steady speed

notable_agents.action: black SUV overtaking on the left lane and moving ahead into the foggy distance

entered.detail: multiple horizontal power lines stretching across the scene on the right side
dark colored SUV with red taillights overtaking the camera vehicle

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes under the first overhead gantry and continues through the fog. Overhead power lines become visible on the right. At 28 seconds, a black SUV overtakes on the left and disappears into the mist ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway approaching second gantry with neon district ahead

events.description: passing under the second overhead highway gantry with illuminated directional signs

agents.ego_description: driving toward a second overhead gantry with neon-lit buildings becoming visible in the distant fog

entered.detail: second overhead highway gantry with illuminated yellow directional signs

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle continuing through the dense fog toward a second overhead gantry. The glass skyscraper on the right appears closer and more detailed, while the left-side billboards fade into the distance. The camera passes under the second gantry as neon-lit structures become visible in the far distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a foggy night highway that transitions from a vista of distant billboards to a closer encounter with towering urban architecture. It begins on wet asphalt illuminated by orange street lamps, gliding toward an overhead gantry with a massive glass skyscraper looming through the mist on the right. As the camera passes under the first gantry, the perspective shifts to reveal overhead power lines on the right while a black SUV overtakes on the left and vanishes into the haze. The scene then pushes deeper into the dense fog, causing the billboards to fade into the distance as the glass skyscraper becomes more detailed and imposing. Finally, the camera passes under a second overhead gantry, revealing the faint glow of neon-lit structures emerging in the far distance.
